title: Trans Woman Sent To An All-Male Prison Alleges She Was Raped More Than 2000 Times In 4 Years - ScoopWhoop
excerpt: Trans Woman Sent To An All-Male Prison Alleges She Was Raped More Than 2000 Times In 4 Years  ScoopWhoop
summary: A transgender woman named Mary reported repeated sexual assaults and coercive rape by male prisoners in the Boggo Road male prison in Queensland while serving a four-year sentence.

title: Male rape survivors overlooked by BNS - Times of India
summary: The article discusses how the BNS removal of Section 377 and reliance on the Transgender Act 2019 affects legal recognition and punishment for sexual assaults against men and transgender people, rather than describing a specific incident.

title: Gang-Raped At 11, Work At Massage Parlours, Degree From NIFT: India's First Transgender Beauty Queen’s Story - ED Times
excerpt: Gang-Raped At 11, Work At Massage Parlours, Degree From NIFT: India's First Transgender Beauty Queen’s Story  ED Times
summary: Aizya Naaz Joshi was gang-raped by a male cousin and his friends, which left her hospitalized.

title: 2 held for transgender person’s gang rape - The Times of India
excerpt: 2 held for transgender person’s gang rape  The Times of India
summary: A 30-year-old transgender complainant alleged that two male accused and a third transgender suspect lured her under a railway flyover where she was gang-raped and assaulted with unnatural acts.
